title: Roasted Vegetable Frittata
description: A delicious and healthy Italian-style omelette filled with roasted vegetables. Perfect for a satisfying breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: Large eggs
ingredients.notes: Fresh eggs are best for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Roasted Italian vegetables
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of zucchini, bell peppers, and onions.

ingredients.name: Diced onion
ingredients.notes: Add some sautéed onion for extra flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh basil
ingredients.notes: Chopped basil adds a nice Italian touch.

ingredients.name: Salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: Season with salt and pepper to taste.

ingredients.name: Grated Parmesan cheese
ingredients.notes: Add some grated Parmesan for extra flavor.

instructions: Whisk the eggs in a large bowl and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the roasted Italian vegetables and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Pour the whisked eggs over the vegetables and cook until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese and chopped basil over the eggs.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the eggs are set.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
